724c9ca5b0cf.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
724c9ca5b0cf.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
724c9ca5b0cf.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

91eab941c038.title: Close the hygiene gap — 2 to 5
91eab941c038.description: An FSA rating of 2 is visible on your Google listing and the FSA website. Customers see it before they see your menu. Address the inspector's specific findings.
91eab941c038.expected_upside: Remove the trust ceiling on your overall score

87b6851368f7.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
87b6851368f7.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

2a0d6a714a52.title: Fix the digital shopfront — you're losing walk-ins
2a0d6a714a52.description: You deliver a strong experience but your online presence doesn't make it easy to act on. Can a new customer confirm your hours, see your menu, and book — all within 60 seconds on their phone? If not, that's your fix list.
2a0d6a714a52.management_implication: Interest without conversion is vanity traffic.

1344da5f681d.title: Strong rating masks weak competitive position
1344da5f681d.description: Your 4.5/5 Google rating feels dominant but you sit below the local median (P0.0). Peer venues achieve similar or better ratings — in this market, 4.5 is table stakes, not a differentiator. Don't mistake the number for an advantage.
1344da5f681d.management_implication: The rating looks good in isolation but not in context.

c2c9965d238a.title: Ranked #2 of 2 locally — peers are ahead
c2c9965d238a.description: At percentile 0.0, customers in this area have higher-rated alternatives. This isn't a crisis but it means you're competing on convenience rather than reputation.

7111af1cbd5b.title: Compliance record weakest in peer set — creates inspection exposure
7111af1cbd5b.description: You trail peers by 5.0 points on trust. This isn't a label problem — it means customers are getting a measurably better experience on this dimension from your competitors.

f4d9bba21840.title: Protect the 4.5/5 rating — it took years to build
f4d9bba21840.description: With 297 reviews at 4.5/5, your discovery advantage is substantial. Protect it by responding to every review within 48 hours and prompting satisfied tables for feedback.
